# SinoTrade Compliance

> Independent regulatory consulting for foreign companies entering the China market.

## About
SinoTrade Compliance provides GACC registration, Chinese label compliance, CCC certification, cosmetics NMPA filing, and cross-border e-commerce consulting for international businesses.

## Services

### GACC Decree 248/249 Registration
Mandatory registration for all food manufacturers exporting to China. Covers 18 food categories under General Administration of Customs of China (GACC) Decrees 248 and 249.
- Registration pathways: direct (general food) vs. recommended (high-risk categories)
- Documentation: business licenses, HACCP/ISO 22000 certificates, product lists
- Validity: 5 years, renewal required 6 months before expiry

### Chinese Label Compliance (GB 7718-2025)
Mandatory Chinese labeling for imported products sold in China.
- Prepackaged food: product name, ingredients, net content, dates, manufacturer info
- Cosmetics: INCI ingredient lists, Chinese translations, NMPA requirements
- Label review and design services for each SKU

### CCC Certification
China Compulsory Certification for products in the CCC catalog.
- Electrical appliances, automotive parts, IT equipment, toys, safety glass
- Factory audits and product testing required
- Certificate validity: 5 years

### Cosmetics NMPA Filing
Registration and filing for imported cosmetics under China's NMPA regulations.
- General cosmetics: filing (备案)
- Special cosmetics: registration (注册)
- Requires Chinese responsible person (境内责任人)

### Cross-Border E-commerce Consulting
Compliance guidance for selling via cross-border e-commerce channels.
- GACC registration exemptions for CBEC
- Purchase limits and positive list (跨境电子商务零售进口商品清单)
- PIPL (Personal Information Protection Law) compliance

### Chinese Trademark Registration
Trademark registration and Chinese brand name development for foreign companies.
- First-to-file system in China
- Madrid Protocol and direct filing options

## Key Facts
- **Location:** Shanghai, China
- **Languages:** Available in 48 languages
- **Independence:** Independent consulting firm, not affiliated with GACC or any government agency

## Contact
- **Email:** info@sinotradecompliance.com
- **WhatsApp:** Available
- **Website:** https://sinotradecompliance.com

## Blog & Resources
The website publishes articles on:
- GACC registration guides
- CCC certification explained
- Cosmetics NMPA filing process
- Cross-border e-commerce in China
- Chinese label compliance

All articles are available in 48 languages.
